description_long: This is a built-in barbecue grill set into a rectangular stone structure, designed for outdoor use in urban parks or backyard patios. The main body of the grill is metallic, featuring a prominent lid with a handle and a control panel with knobs on the front. The grill is flanked by wide stone countertops on both sides, providing ample space for food preparation or utensil placement. The stone base is constructed from rectangular, light-gray masonry blocks, giving it a sturdy and permanent appearance. The cooking surface consists of parallel black grates, and the metallic lid likely covers the main grilling area. There are no visible wheels, indicating that the grill is intended to be a fixed installation.
description: A built-in gas barbecue grill with a metallic lid and control panel, set into a sturdy stone countertop structure. The grill features wide stone side surfaces and a prominent front-facing cooking area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the metallic lid, control knobs, and the stone countertop extending on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the stone base and the striped grill grates on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full width of the stone structure and the back of the metallic lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the stone base and grill grates from the other end.
